idea: CI/CD pipeline with test, image build, security scan, and staged deployment
why_this_project_matters: This template reflects a more realistic delivery path where build quality, artifact creation, and environment-specific deployment all have explicit gates.
architecture: A GitHub Actions workflow runs quality checks first, then builds and scans a Docker image. The deployment stage is restricted to the main branch and uses GitHub environments plus secrets to deliver manifests into staging.
steps: Create repository secrets for registry credentials and kubeconfig material.
Run the pipeline on pull requests so code quality and image validity are enforced before merge.
Allow only the main branch to publish images and deploy to staging.
Review vulnerability scan output and fail the build on high-severity findings.
Promote the same image digest into production using a separate protected environment.
